title: EncryptionService has zero tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
description: No test exercises EncryptionService directly. Tests in FitTrackerCoreTests.swift indirectly rely on EncryptedDataStore but never test: key derivation, AES-GCM correctness, IV uniqueness, wrong-key decryption failure, key rotation, or keychain fallback.
evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'EncryptionService' → zero results
recommended_fix: Add EncryptionServiceTests.swift covering: round-trip encrypt/decrypt, wrong-key rejection, IV uniqueness, empty-data edge, corrupted-ciphertext handling, keychain key regeneration

title: AuthManager has zero direct tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
description: No test directly instantiates AuthManager. State machine (unauthenticated → authenticating → authenticated → locked) untested. State transitions from app lifecycle events completely absent.
evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'AuthManager' → zero results
recommended_fix: Add AuthManagerTests.swift covering: initial state, authentication transition, lock/unlock cycle, session expiry, concurrent sign-in protection

title: CloudKitSyncService has zero tests — high-risk file per CLAUDE.md
description: No tests for sync conflict resolution, zone creation, push/fetch operations, network-offline fallback, or error recovery.
evidence: No file in FitTrackerTests/ imports or tests CloudKitSyncService behaviour
recommended_fix: Add CloudKitSyncServiceTests.swift with mock CKDatabase. Cover: zone setup, record serialisation, conflict resolution, offline queue

title: SupabaseSyncService sync logic untested beyond disabled-state check
description: Only test checks .disabled status when credentials absent. Actual sync logic (fetchChanges, pushChanges, token refresh, retry, pagination, merge) has zero coverage.
evidence: FitTrackerCoreTests.swift:487-494 — sole test, only .disabled path
recommended_fix: Add SupabaseSyncServiceTests.swift with mock URLSession. Cover: successful pull, 401 retry, network timeout, empty-delta, merge dispatch

title: HealthKitService has zero tests — primary input to ReadinessEngine
description: HealthKitService handles HRV, resting HR, sleep, step count. No tests for: permission flow, HKQuery construction, data mapping, unavailable fallback, stale data handling.
evidence: find FitTrackerTests -name '*.swift' | xargs grep -l 'HealthKitService' → zero results
recommended_fix: Add HealthKitServiceTests.swift with mock HKHealthStore. Cover: permission grant/deny, HRV mapping, nil-data degradation

title: SignInService token expiry and refresh path untested
description: 11 tests cover happy-path and config-gate paths. Missing: JWT expiry detection, token refresh flow, network-failure during sign-in, rate-limit handling, OTP verification failure.
evidence: All 11 tests exercise happy-path or config-gate. No expiry/refresh test.
recommended_fix: Add tests for: expired JWT, token refresh success/failure, OTP wrong-code, rate-limit surfacing

title: AIOrchestrator cloud-tier and adaptation paths untested
description: Single test exercises local-fallback only with empty snapshot. Missing: cloud-tier path, FoundationModel adaptation, concurrent segment processing, error handling.
evidence: FitTrackerCoreTests.swift:344-362 — single test, local fallback only
recommended_fix: Add AIOrchestratorTests.swift: cloud call with complete bands, adaptation above/below 0.4 threshold, error recovery

title: All 5 AI adapters have zero tests
description: HealthKitAdapter, NutritionAdapter, ProfileAdapter, TrainingAdapter, AIInputAdapter — none have direct tests. Mapping logic untested.
evidence: grep across FitTrackerTests for any adapter name → zero results
recommended_fix: Add AIAdaptersTests.swift with golden I/O per adapter. Focus on edge cases: zero meals, nil biometrics, no training logs

title: RecommendationMemory has zero tests
description: Caching/deduplication for AI recommendations. No tests for store/retrieve, TTL expiry, segment isolation, or eviction.
evidence: zero references in test files
recommended_fix: Add tests: store/retrieve round-trip, TTL expiry, segment isolation, clear()

title: ValidatedRecommendation validation logic untested
description: Wraps AIRecommendation with confidence thresholds, signal non-emptiness, segment consistency. Zero tests.
evidence: zero references in test files
recommended_fix: Add tests: valid passes, below-threshold fails, empty signals fails, segment mismatch fails

title: AccountDeletionService missing executeDeletion success path test
description: 3 tests cover request/cancel/grace-period. Missing: full deletion success, partial backend failure, post-deletion sign-out.
evidence: testExecuteDeletion only exercises simulator path asserting 'still pending' error
recommended_fix: Add mock-based tests for full deletion, partial failure, grace period enforcement

title: WatchConnectivityService has zero tests
description: Watch/Phone data transfer with no tests for activation, messaging, applicationContext, or offline queue.
evidence: zero references in test files
recommended_fix: Add WatchConnectivityServiceTests.swift with mock WCSession

title: NotificationService scheduling and delivery logic untested
description: NotificationTests covers content builder and preferences. Missing: scheduleNotification(), permission flow, daily cap, duplicate prevention, quiet-hour suppression.
evidence: Tests never call NotificationService methods directly
recommended_fix: Add tests with mock UNUserNotificationCenter for scheduling, caps, quiet hours

title: ReminderScheduler and ReminderTriggers untested
description: ReminderTests covers ReminderType enum only. Missing: schedule(), lifetime cap enforcement, canSchedule(), trigger condition evaluation.
evidence: zero references to ReminderScheduler or ReminderTriggers in tests
recommended_fix: Add ReminderSchedulerTests.swift for lifetime limits, scheduling logic, trigger evaluation

title: AppSettings has zero tests
description: User-facing configuration. No tests for defaults, persistence, or migration.
evidence: zero references in test files
recommended_fix: Add basic tests: defaults match spec, UserDefaults round-trip, migration

title: TrainingProgramStore only has weekday mapping tested
description: Single test with 7 assertions for dayType(forWeekday:). Missing: phase transitions, currentProgram, exercise lists, set template defaults.
evidence: FitTrackerCoreTests.swift:93-101 — weekday mapping only
recommended_fix: Add tests for phase advancement, exercise list, set templates

title: GoalProfile has zero tests
description: Encapsulates goal context for AIOrchestrator weighting. No tests for construction, mapping, or defaults.
evidence: zero references in test files
recommended_fix: Add tests: GoalProfile from each NutritionGoalMode, default when nil

title: WCAG token test asserts literal constant, not live token value
description: testTextTertiaryOpacityMeetsWCAGAA() creates local tertiaryOpacity = 0.55 and asserts >= 0.55. Never reads AppColor.Text.tertiary. Passes even if production token regresses.
evidence: Local variable, no reference to AppColor or AppTheme
recommended_fix: Expose opacity as testable constant and assert against it

title: Spacing scale test hardcodes 8 values — won't catch new non-conforming tokens
description: Tests 8 hardcoded AppSpacing values. If new non-4pt-grid token added, test won't catch it.
evidence: Hardcoded array, no iteration over all tokens
recommended_fix: Expose AppSpacing.allValues and iterate, or CI gate on tokens.json

title: Confidence gate boundary test asserts local arithmetic, not production code
description: testEval_confidenceGateBoundary() defines threshold=0.4 locally. Does not call AIOrchestrator. Production threshold change undetected.
evidence: All assertions use local variables, no production code reference
recommended_fix: Write black-box test: AIOrchestrator with confidence 0.39 (no adaptation) and 0.41 (adaptation applied)

title: Quiet-hours test asserts local arithmetic, never calls NotificationService
description: Defines quiet-hour rule inline and asserts. Never calls production isQuietHour(). Production change undetected.
evidence: Local computation, no NotificationService method call
recommended_fix: Make isQuietHour() internal and test against production code

title: Sync merge tests missing same-timestamp tie-breaking and nil modifiedAt
description: Tests cover remote-newer, local-newer, no-local. Missing: same-timestamp tie, nil modifiedAt, nil remote field overwriting populated local.
evidence: 4 daily log + 3 weekly snapshot tests, no tie or nil cases
recommended_fix: Add tie-breaking, nil-timestamp, and nil-field-overwrite tests

title: No offline/no-network tests for any sync or auth service
description: Entire suite has no offline scenario tests. No URLProtocol subclass or network stub exists.
evidence: No network mocking infrastructure in test suite
recommended_fix: Introduce URLProtocol-based network stub. Add offline sync queuing, auth error, reconnect retry tests

title: Import tests missing malformed CSV edge cases and performance test
description: 15 tests cover happy-path CSV/JSON. Missing: missing required columns, non-numeric values, unknown JSON fields, large input performance.
evidence: All CSV tests use well-formed 2-row inputs
recommended_fix: Add malformed CSV, non-numeric, unknown field, and measure() performance tests

title: No XCUITest files — zero UI integration test coverage
description: Only XCTestCase unit and eval tests. No XCUITest files. Critical user journeys untested in automation.
evidence: No FitTrackerUITests target found
recommended_fix: Add FitTrackerUITests: sign-in, onboarding, home readiness card, nutrition meal-log flow

title: No snapshot tests for design system components
description: No snapshot tests for 13 design system components. Token changes can visually break components undetected by CI.
evidence: No SnapshotTesting imports or XCTSnapshot references
recommended_fix: Integrate swift-snapshot-testing for AppCard, AppButton variants, light/dark mode

title: No performance tests for ReadinessEngine or EncryptedDataStore
description: ReadinessEngine.compute() called on every foreground with 90+ logs. EncryptedDataStore loads all on startup. No measure() tests.
evidence: No self.measure {} or XCTPerformanceMetric in any test file
recommended_fix: Add performance tests: ReadinessEngine with 90 logs (<50ms), EncryptedDataStore load/save (<100ms)

title: No accessibility tests
description: No tests for Dynamic Type, VoiceOver labels, or minimum tap targets. UX foundations mandates accessibility but no automated enforcement.
evidence: No XCUIAccessibilityElement or UIAccessibility APIs in tests
recommended_fix: Add accessibility tests: all interactive elements have labels, min 44x44pt, Dynamic Type XXL no clip

title: AIOutputQualityEvals duplicates private humanReadableSignal from production UI
description: Replicates switch statement from AIInsightCard. Comment acknowledges sync risk. If production changes, eval silently diverges.
evidence: Private copy of production function, not a reference
recommended_fix: Extract as internal static function, test calls production code directly

title: makeLogs() uses Double.random — tests are non-deterministic
description: Adds random offsets to HRV, restingHR, sleepHours. Could theoretically produce out-of-range results on unlucky seeds.
evidence: Double.random(in: -5...5) in test helper
recommended_fix: Replace with deterministic offsets or fixed seed
